data.title: 国际服活动「A certain Scientific Record of Youth」
data.summary: [Event Preview] Some mysterious students claiming to be from another world appeared suddenly in the
data.body:
[Event Preview]

Some mysterious students claiming to be from another world appeared suddenly in the Millennium District's ruins!

Just how is this possible?
Find out in the upcoming Event Story - Certain Scientific Record of Youth!

#BlueArchive
